zh.Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德
zh.Harthill, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾哈迪爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry de Percy於大約1380年出生在蘇格蘭培爾阿爾時，他的父親Sir Thomas Percy15歲，母親Elizabeth Strathbogie19歲。他於1402年12月7日之後與Elizabeth Bardolph結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1432年10月25日在英國英格蘭越可爾哈迪爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.Northumberland, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德
zh-hans.Harthill, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾哈迪爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry de Percy于大约1380年出生在苏格兰培爾阿爾时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Percy15岁，母亲Elizabeth Strathbogie19岁。他于1402年12月7日之后与Elizabeth Bardolph结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1432年10月25日在英国英格兰越可爾哈迪爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry de Percy was born about 1380, in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Thomas Percy, was 15 and his mother, Elizabeth Strathbogie, was 19. He married Elizabeth Bardolph after 7 December 1402. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 25 October 1432, in Harthill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry de Percy est né environ 1380, à Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Thomas Percy, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Strathbogie, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Bardolph après 7 décembre 1402. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1432, à Harthill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry de Percy um 1380 in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Percy 15 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Strathbogie 19. Er hat nach 7. Dezember 1402 Elizabeth Bardolph geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1432 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Harthill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry de Percy è nato il circa 1380 nel Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Percy, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Strathbogie, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Bardolph dopo il 7 dicembre 1402. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 25 ottobre 1432, nel Harthill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Percyが約1380年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアソルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Percyは15歳，母Elizabeth Strathbogieは19歳であった。1402年12月7日以後にElizabeth Bardolphと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1432年10月25日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハースイルで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Percy(이)가 대략 1380년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 앳홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Percy(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Strathbogie(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1402년 12월 7일 이후 Elizabeth Bardolph(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1432년 10월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 하스이에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Harthill, Yorkshire, England: Harthill, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry de Percy nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Thomas Percy, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Strathbogie, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Bardolph após 7 de dezembro de 1402. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1432, em Harthill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry de Percy родился около 1380 г. в местности атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Percy было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Strathbogie, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Bardolph после 7 декабрь 1402 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 25 октября 1432 г. в местности хартилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry de Percy nació aproximadamente 1380, en Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Thomas Percy, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Strathbogie, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Bardolph después de 7 de diciembre de 1402. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1432, en Harthill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años.
